title: FERTICOOP-GO Innovations to adapt to the best available techniques (BAT) in the Catalan cooperative agricultural sector
description: A final project results sheet presenting the outcomes of an innovation partnership operational group that developed tools and techniques for environmental management of livestock manure and agricultural fertilisation within Catalan cooperatives. It details strategies to reduce phosphorus in soil, rapid soil fertility assays, a digital data integration platform, biogas and emissions evaluations, and compost quality assessments to enhance sustainability and resource use efficiency.
